notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Zach Neto. Henry Bolte to 2nd. Henry Bolte advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Zach Neto walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Zach Neto homers (8) on a fly ball to center field. Jose Siri scores.

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof plunked
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof hit by pitch. Henry Bolte to 3rd. Jeff McNeil to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler singles on a line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. Zack Gelof scores.

notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz grounds into a double play, second baseman Adam Frazier to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Shea Langeliers out at 2nd. Nick Kurtz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz grounds into a double play, second baseman Adam Frazier to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Shea Langeliers out at 2nd. Nick Kurtz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
